title: Agnikul test-fires first-of-its-kind 3D-printed booster engine
summary: Unlike traditional engines that take several months to manufacture, Agnikul’s engines can be fully 3D printed in just seven days. This reduces production complexity and turnaround time

title: Three AIMIM leaders held for hate speech in Meerut
summary: All India Majlis-e-Ittehadul's (AIMIM) western Uttar Pradesh president Mahtab Chauhan, metropolitan president Imran Ansari and metropolitan secretary Raji Siddiqui were arrested following late-night raids, officials said

title: Fuel crisis LIVE: PM Modi, Sri Lankan President hold discussions on ‘energy cooperation’
summary: Oil falls more than 5%, Asian shares gain over Trump's talk of Iran negotiations

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE updates: Rajya Sabha to take up discussion on Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026
summary: Nirmala Sitharaman is expected to reply to the discussion on Finance Bill 2026 in Lok Sabha to complete the Budget process

title: Kumbh Mela fame Monalisa Bhosle accuses director of ‘misbehaving’ with minor girls
summary: Monalisa Bhosle made the allegation at a press conference in Kerala, where she also sought help from the Centre and State governments of Kerala and Madhya Pradesh, claiming that she and her husband were receiving death threats

title: Sonia Gandhi admitted to Delhi’s Sir Ganga Ram hospital; condition stable
summary: This is the second time that the Rajya Sabha MP had been admitted this year.

title: Kerala Assembly elections: Congress reiterates LDF-NDA ‘secret deal’ claims
summary: Ramesh Chennithala says there is an ‘unwritten political understanding’ between CM Pinarayi Vijayan and PM Modi to ‘keep Congress away from power’ in Kerala. He alleges the understanding began during 2021 Assembly polls

title: Allahabad HC extends interim stay on CJM order to lodge FIR against Sambhal police
